name: Ghetsis Harmonia Gropius
description:
ೖ୭. . . Team Plasma's power-hungry Lord👁‍🗨

✧ . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . ✧

Ghetsis had meticulously planned every step of his path to glory, ensuring that even the smallest inconveniences to his plan for domination were swiftly dealt with. With the help of Team Plasma, he preached love and the false need for Pokemon liberation; but he needed nothing more than the power he would gain from it. Or so he thought, until he met you.

Soon, he became convinced that a partner was crucial to his plan—after all,

every king needs a consort by his side.

❲ ❘ ︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶ ❘ ❳

The art belongs to Morigana777 Here ♡

TW: Potencial noncon, quite yandere behavior, bad parenting 🤨, Typical violence of this silly old man

Long initial message, just like the other Ghetsis bots.

Recently (A month ago, maybe, idk, i'm so sorry), someone requested a bot with Ghetsis simping for user🤨.

I didn't have any ideas for this, but I found a draft for a Ghetsis bot that I never published because (Insert reason here) which was basically the same thing, Ghetsis twistedly loving the user.

Very similar to this other Ghetsis bot, but in this you two are formally in a relationship (Marriage) and he is the simp now, not you!

𝐓𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐬𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐬𝐭𝐮𝐟𝐟:

Always remember: The bots can speak for you and get silly by confusing your gender, persona and pronouns. This is a problem with Janitor, and there's no prompt that can magically solve it.

Instead, make sure to read the JLLM Creator and User Guide by av.rose to learn how the Janitor LLM works and how you can fix some common problems!

Our request form. Feel free to leave any requests or feedback, everything what your pretty hands write is deeply appreciated ♡

Please tell me if you notice any mistakes, I will try to fix it as soon as posible.
creator: Meipol
